    46	type managedWorkerCommandBuilderFunc func(projectRoot, workerID string, spec ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec) (*exec.Cmd, error)
    47	
    48	func (m *WorkerManager) StartManagedExecuteLoop(spec ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec) (WorkerRecord, error) {
    49		effectiveRoot := spec.ProjectRoot
    50		if effectiveRoot == "" {
    51			effectiveRoot = m.projectRoot
    52		}
    53		spec.ProjectRoot = effectiveRoot
    54		spec.ApplyDefaults()
    55		if err := spec.Validate(); err != nil {
    56			return WorkerRecord{}, err
    57		}
    58	
    59		// Managed workers are launched through the CLI child path, which already
    60		// treats route constraints opaquely. Force the same semantics here so the
    61		// persisted spec and child invocation match ddx work.
    62		spec.OpaquePassthrough = true
    63	
    64		if err := os.MkdirAll(m.rootDir, 0o755); err != nil {
    65			return WorkerRecord{}, err
    66		}
    67	
    68		id := "worker-" + time.Now().UTC().Format("20060102T150405") + "-" + randomSuffix(4)
    69		dir := filepath.Join(m.rootDir, id)
    70		if err := os.MkdirAll(dir, 0o755); err != nil {
    71			return WorkerRecord{}, err
    72		}
    73	
    74		specData, _ := json.MarshalIndent(spec, "", "  ")
    75		_ = os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, "spec.json"), append(specData, '\n'), 0o644)
    76	
    77		logPath := filepath.Join(dir, "worker.log")
    78		logFile, err := os.OpenFile(logPath, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC, 0o644)
    79		if err != nil {
    80			return WorkerRecord{}, err
    81		}
    82	
    83		startedAt := time.Now().UTC()
    84		record := WorkerRecord{
    85			ID:           id,
    86			Kind:         "work",
    87			State:        "running",
    88			Status:       "running",
    89			ProjectRoot:  effectiveRoot,
    90			Harness:      spec.Harness,
    91			Model:        spec.Model,
    92			Profile:      agent.NormalizeRoutingProfile(spec.Profile),
    93			Effort:       spec.Effort,
    94			Once:         executeLoopOnce(spec),
    95			PollInterval: executeLoopPollInterval(spec).String(),
    96			StdoutPath:   relToProject(m.projectRoot, logPath),
    97			SpecPath:     relToProject(m.projectRoot, filepath.Join(dir, "spec.json")),
    98			StartedAt:    startedAt,
    99			Lifecycle: []WorkerLifecycleEvent{{
   100				Action:    "start",
   101				Actor:     "local-operator",
   102				Timestamp: startedAt,
   103				Detail:    lifecycleStartDetail(spec) + " managed=true",
   104			}},
   105		}
   106	
   107		builder := m.managedWorkerCommandBuilder
   108		if builder == nil {
   109			builder = defaultManagedWorkerCommand
   110		}
   111		cmd, err := builder(effectiveRoot, id, spec)
   112		if err != nil {
   113			_ = logFile.Close()
   114			record.State = "failed"
   115			record.Status = "failed"
   116			record.Error = err.Error()
   117			record.LastError = err.Error()
   118			record.FinishedAt = time.Now().UTC()
   119			_ = m.writeRecord(dir, record)
   120			return WorkerRecord{}, err
   121		}
   122		configureManagedWorkerProcessGroup(cmd)
   123	
   124		logBuf := newLockedBuffer()
   125		multiLog := io.MultiWriter(logBuf, logFile)
   126		cmd.Stdout = multiLog
   127		cmd.Stderr = multiLog
   128	
   129		if err := cmd.Start(); err != nil {
   130			_ = logFile.Close()
   131			record.State = "failed"
   132			record.Status = "failed"
   133			record.Error = err.Error()
   134			record.LastError = err.Error()
   135			record.FinishedAt = time.Now().UTC()
   136			_ = m.writeRecord(dir, record)
   137			return WorkerRecord{}, err
   138		}
   139	
   140		record.PID = cmd.Process.Pid
   141		if pgid, pgidErr := managedWorkerProcessGroupID(cmd.Process.Pid); pgidErr == nil && pgid > 0 {
   142			record.PGID = pgid
   143		} else {
   144			record.PGID = cmd.Process.Pid
   145		}
   146		record.Lifecycle[0].Detail = fmt.Sprintf("%s pid=%d pgid=%d managed=true", lifecycleStartDetail(spec), record.PID, record.PGID)
   147		_ = m.writeRecord(dir, record)
   148	
   149		progressCh := make(chan agent.ProgressEvent, 16)
   150		handle := &workerHandle{
   151			record:       record,
   152			cancel:       func() {},
   153			logBuf:       logBuf,
   154			logFile:      logFile,
   155			progressCh:   progressCh,
   156			progressDone: make(chan struct{}),
   157			lastPhaseTS:  startedAt,
   158		}
   159	
   160		_, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
   161		handle.cancel = cancel
   162	
   163		m.mu.Lock()
   164		m.workers[id] = handle
   165		m.mu.Unlock()

   170		go m.watchManagedWorkerExit(dir, handle, cmd)
   171	
   172		return record, nil
   173	}

   175	func defaultManagedWorkerCommand(projectRoot, workerID string, spec ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec) (*exec.Cmd, error) {
   176		exe, err := os.Executable()
   177		if err != nil {
   178			return nil, err
   179		}

   182		if strings.TrimSpace(projectRoot) != "" {
   183			args = append(args, "--project", projectRoot)
   184		}
   185		appendManagedString := func(flag, value string) {
   186			if strings.TrimSpace(value) == "" {
   187				return
   188			}
   189			args = append(args, flag, value)
   190		}
   191		appendManagedDuration := func(flag string, d time.Duration) {
   192			if d <= 0 {
   193				return
   194			}
   195			args = append(args, flag, d.String())
   196		}
   197	
   198		appendManagedString("--from", spec.FromRev)
   199		appendManagedString("--harness", spec.Harness)
   200		appendManagedString("--model", spec.Model)
   201		appendManagedString("--profile", spec.Profile)
   202		appendManagedString("--provider", spec.Provider)
   203		appendManagedString("--effort", spec.Effort)
   204		appendManagedString("--attempt-backend", spec.AttemptBackend)
   205		appendManagedString("--label-filter", spec.LabelFilter)
   206		if spec.IgnoreCooldown {
   207			args = append(args, "--ignore-cooldown")
   208			appendManagedString("--reason", spec.CooldownOverrideReason)
   209		}
   210		switch spec.Mode {

   212			args = append(args, "--once")
   213		case executeloop.ModeWatch:
   214			args = append(args, "--watch")
   215			appendManagedDuration("--idle-interval", spec.IdleInterval.Duration)
   216		}
   217		if spec.NoReview {

   219		}
   220		appendManagedString("--review-harness", spec.ReviewHarness)
   221		appendManagedString("--review-model", spec.ReviewModel)
   222		if spec.MaxCostUSD != 0 {
   223			args = append(args, "--max-cost", fmt.Sprintf("%g", spec.MaxCostUSD))
   224		}
   225		if spec.MaxBeadCostUSD != 0 {

   230		}
   231		appendManagedDuration("--preclaim-timeout", spec.PreClaimTimeout.Duration)
   232		appendManagedDuration("--route-resolution-timeout", spec.RouteResolutionTimeout.Duration)
   233		appendManagedDuration("--request-timeout", spec.RequestTimeout.Duration)
   234		appendManagedDuration("--rate-limit-max-wait", spec.RateLimitMaxWait.Duration)
   235		if spec.MinPower != 0 {
   236			args = append(args, "--min-power", fmt.Sprintf("%d", spec.MinPower))
   237		}
   238		if spec.MaxPower != 0 {
   239			args = append(args, "--max-power", fmt.Sprintf("%d", spec.MaxPower))
   240		}
   241	
   242		return exec.Command(exe, args...), nil
   243	}
   244	
   245	func (m *WorkerManager) watchManagedWorkerExit(dir string, handle *workerHandle, cmd *exec.Cmd) {
   246		waitErr := cmd.Wait()
   247		close(handle.progressCh)
   248		<-handle.progressDone
   249	
   250		m.mu.Lock()
   251		record := handle.record
   252		preservedState := ""
   253		if record.State == "stopped" || record.State == "reaped" {
   254			preservedState = record.State
   255		}
   256		record.FinishedAt = time.Now().UTC()
   257		record.Substate = ""
   258		if waitErr != nil {
   259			record.State = "failed"
   260			record.Status = "failed"

   241	// WakeProject signals every running work worker bound to projectRoot
   242	// to skip its current idle-poll sleep and re-scan the ready queue. Used by
   243	// the operator-prompt approve / auto-approve mutations (Story 15) so a
   244	// freshly-approved bead is claimed immediately rather than after a full
   245	// PollInterval. The send is non-blocking and the per-worker wake channel is
   246	// buffered (cap 1), so multiple wakes within one tick coalesce. Returns the
   247	// number of workers signalled (0 when no work is running for the
   248	// project — submit/approve still succeeds, the next tick on a future worker
   249	// will pick the bead up).
   250	func (m *WorkerManager) WakeProject(projectRoot string) int {
   251		m.mu.Lock()
   252		defer m.mu.Unlock()
   253		signalled := 0
   254		for _, h := range m.workers {
   255			if h == nil || h.wakeCh == nil {
   256				continue
   257			}
   258			if h.record.ProjectRoot != projectRoot {
   259				continue
   260			}
